name: Akamai API
what_it_does: Enterprise CDN and cloud security platform API for managing content delivery, WAF rules, DDoS mitigation, bot management, and edge application delivery policies.
use_cases: Programmatic cache invalidation (fast purge) from deployment pipelines
Managing WAF security policies and firewall rules via Akamai OPEN APIs
Configuring property rules and edge behaviors for traffic management
Retrieving CDN traffic analytics and real-time reporting
Bot Manager configuration and bot traffic analysis
not_for: Small websites or apps not requiring enterprise CDN pricing
best_when: You're an enterprise customer using Akamai CDN and need programmatic control over delivery configurations, security policies, and cache operations.
avoid_when: You're not an Akamai customer — Fastly or Cloudflare have more developer-friendly on-ramps.

auth.notes: Akamai EdgeGrid signing — custom HMAC-based request signing with client token, client secret, and access token. Not standard OAuth or API key. SDK handles signing. Credentials scoped to specific API access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; enterprise contracts only
pricing.notes: Enterprise contracts with volume-based pricing. Among the most expensive CDN options. Primarily for Fortune 500 enterprises. API access included with Akamai contract.

performance.rate_limits: Fast Purge: 500 requests/second; other APIs vary

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: JSON errors with type and title fields. Error messages are informative but Akamai-specific terminology requires documentation knowledge.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Property activations use activation IDs for tracking. Fast Purge operations are idempotent. Configuration changes require version management.
known_agent_gotchas: EdgeGrid authentication is unique to Akamai — must use Akamai SDK or EdgeGrid signing library
Property Manager uses a version/activation model — changes require creating a new version and activating it
Akamai OPEN API has 40+ separate API families — must know which API handles which feature
Fast Purge is separate from property activation — content can be purged independently of config changes
Akamai's edge behaviors use a complex rule tree JSON structure — schema is non-trivial
Staging environment activations required before production — two-stage deployment process

security_score_components.security_notes: EdgeGrid authentication (4-part credential set). CDN/WAF/DDoS platform — admin access is high-value target. API tokens have fine-grained service scopes. Rotate credentials regularly.
